description: Provides access to Korean stock market data including OHLCV prices, market capitalization, fundamental indicators, and trading volume by investor type for KOSPI and KOSDAQ listed securities.

tools.name: get_stock_ohlcv
tools.description: Retrieve OHLCV (Open/High/Low/Close/Volume) price data for a specific stock over a date range.

fromdate.description: Start date for the data retrieval period in YYYYMMDD format.

todate.description: End date for the data retrieval period in YYYYMMDD format.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol identifying the security on KOSPI or KOSDAQ.

adjusted.description: Whether to return adjusted prices accounting for stock splits and dividends. True for adjusted prices, False for unadjusted raw prices.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol identifying the security on KOSPI or KOSDAQ.

data.description: List of daily OHLCV records for the requested date range.

date.description: The trading date in YYYYMMDD format.

open.description: The opening price of the stock for the trading day.

high.description: The highest price of the stock during the trading day.

low.description: The lowest price of the stock during the trading day.

close.description: The closing price of the stock for the trading day.

volume.description: The total number of shares traded during the trading day.

tools.name: get_stock_market_cap
tools.description: Retrieve market capitalization data for a specific stock over a date range.

fromdate.description: Start date for the data retrieval period in YYYYMMDD format.

todate.description: End date for the data retrieval period in YYYYMMDD format.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol identifying the security on KOSPI or KOSDAQ.
The stock ticker symbol identifying the security on KOSPI or KOSDAQ.

data.description: List of daily market capitalization records for the requested date range.

date.description: The trading date in YYYYMMDD format.

market_cap.description: The total market capitalization of the stock calculated as share price multiplied by outstanding shares.

tools.name: get_stock_fundamental
tools.description: Retrieve fundamental valuation indicators (PER, PBR, Dividend Yield) for a specific stock over a date range.

fromdate.description: Start date for the data retrieval period in YYYYMMDD format.

todate.description: End date for the data retrieval period in YYYYMMDD format.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol identifying the security on KOSPI or KOSDAQ.
The stock ticker symbol identifying the security on KOSPI or KOSDAQ.

data.description: List of daily fundamental indicator records for the requested date range.

date.description: The trading date in YYYYMMDD format.

per.description: Price-to-Earnings Ratio measuring the stock price relative to earnings per share.

pbr.description: Price-to-Book Ratio measuring the stock price relative to book value per share.

dividend_yield.description: The annual dividend payment expressed as a percentage of the stock price.

tools.name: get_stock_trading_volume
tools.description: Retrieve trading volume breakdown by investor type (individual, institutional, foreign) for a specific stock over a date range.

fromdate.description: Start date for the data retrieval period in YYYYMMDD format.

todate.description: End date for the data retrieval period in YYYYMMDD format.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol identifying the security on KOSPI or KOSDAQ.
The stock ticker symbol identifying the security on KOSPI or KOSDAQ.

data.description: List of daily trading volume records segmented by investor type for the requested date range.

date.description: The trading date in YYYYMMDD format.

individual.description: Trading volume attributed to individual retail investors.

institutional.description: Trading volume attributed to institutional investors such as funds and asset managers.

foreign.description: Trading volume attributed to foreign investors.
